common/model/pom.xml.general_idea: Configure the Maven compiler plugin to target Java 21 release version.
common/model/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this configuration, the project may compile against the default JDK version of the build environment rather than strictly targeting Java 21, potentially leading to runtime incompatibilities or usage of APIs not available in Java 21.

common/model/src/main/java/org/hpcclab/o.general_idea: Refactor wildcard Lombok import to explicit import for better code clarity and maintainability.

common/model/src/test/java/org/hpcclab/o.general_idea: Replace List.get(0) with List.getFirst() to use the new Java 21 convenience method.
Replace List.get(0) on inputs list with List.getFirst() to use the new Java 21 convenience method.

common/repository/pom.xml.general_idea: Configure the Maven compiler plugin to target Java 21 bytecode.
common/repository/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the compiler defaults to the source/target version of the parent POM or previous configuration (Java 17), resulting in bytecode incompatible with the Java 21 runtime or failing to utilize Java 21 language features if source level is also updated.

common/repository/src/main/java/org/hpcc.general_idea: Replace deprecated List.add(int, E) with List.addFirst(E) for inserting at the beginning of a list.

common/service-interface/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Lombok dependency to a version compatible with Java 21.
common/service-interface/pom.xml.why_exists: Older Lombok versions (e.g., 1.18.22) may fail to compile or process annotations correctly on Java 21 due to internal API changes or lack of support for newer bytecode versions.

common/service-interface/pom.xml.general_idea: Configure Maven compiler plugin to target Java 21 release.
common/service-interface/pom.xml.why_exists: Without setting the release to 21, the code will be compiled for an older Java version, potentially missing Java 21 features or failing to run on a strict Java 21 runtime if specific features are used.

kube-provisioner/pom.xml.general_idea: Set the Maven compiler release target to Java 21 to ensure bytecode compatibility with the new JDK version.
kube-provisioner/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project would compile against the default JDK version (likely 17 or the host JDK), potentially failing to run on Java 21 due to missing features or, conversely, failing to enforce Java 21 API usage if the source code relies on it.

kube-provisioner/src/main/java/org/hpccl.general_idea: Replace deprecated List.get(0) with List.getFirst() for Java 21 compatibility.
kube-provisioner/src/main/java/org/hpccl.why_exists: List.get(0) is not strictly a compile error in Java 21, but List.getFirst() is the preferred modern API introduced in Java 21 to replace index-based access for the first element, often flagged by linters or required by strict migration policies to use new APIs.

object-controller/pom.xml.general_idea: Set the Java compiler release target to version 21 to ensure bytecode compatibility with JDK 21.
object-controller/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project may compile against older bytecode versions or fail to enforce JDK 21 language features and API restrictions required by the target runtime.

object-controller/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the lombok-mapstruct-binding annotation processor dependency to version 0.2.0.

object-controller/src/main/java/org/hpcc.general_idea: Replace deprecated List.get(0) with List.getFirst() introduced in Java 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 21 to align with the JDK migration.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against Java 17, failing to utilize Java 21 features and potentially causing runtime incompatibilities if Java 21-specific APIs are used in code.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Project Lombok version to a newer release compatible with the updated build environment.

storage-adapter/pom.xml.general_idea: Configure the Maven compiler plugin to target Java 21 bytecode.
storage-adapter/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against the default JDK version (likely 17), resulting in bytecode incompatible with Java 21 features or runtime expectations.

task-completion-handler/pom.xml.general_idea: Configure the Maven compiler plugin to target Java 21 bytecode.
task-completion-handler/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this, the project compiles against the default source/target version (likely 17), failing to utilize Java 21 features or causing runtime incompatibility if strict JDK 21 enforcement is required.

task-manager/pom.xml.general_idea: Configure the Maven compiler plugin to target Java 21 bytecode.
task-manager/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against the default source/target version (likely Java 17), failing to utilize Java 21 features or causing compatibility issues with libraries requiring Java 21.
